scope_boundary: The retained local records separated artifact/digest, behavioral, membership-attack privacy proxy, storage, backup, and descendant outcomes, but did not execute service restart or external compensation.
transition_reason: The complete six-outcome proposition cannot move because two named outcomes were unexecuted; the exact narrower multi-axis separation result is retained without support promotion.
downgrade_triggers: outcome axes collapsed into one success bit
promotion_burden: Execute service restart and external compensation with independent observation, delayed effects, open-world inventory pressure, failure injection, recovery objectives, costs, replication, and transfer.
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core or subordinate support state
does not establish service recovery, privacy repair, complete storage erasure, external compensation, or effect-complete rollback
does not establish production safety, SOTA, AGI, ASI, publication, release, or deployment readiness
